{{Shell
|name={{#titleparts:{{PAGENAME}}}}
|image={{#titleparts:{{PAGENAME}}}}.png
|description= Snail Shell's first owner was a martyr, who was dead when pilgrims found it. The pilgrims claimed that the owner had returned to the angels, but those who stole Snail Shell found a diary that asked for Satan's blessing.
|affct=FTH
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=6083
|relic1=The Last Supper
|relic2=Golden Scarab
|relic3=Forbidden Fruit
|relic4=Ark of Covenant
|relic5=Shroud of Turin
}}
|color=blue
|earth=5
|water=3
|fire=3
|wind=3
|form=Angel
|element=Earth
|realm=Britland
|orangehard=ATK
}}
